AgentConfig.description: One concrete agent scaffolded under agents/<key>_agent.py

system_prompt.description: System prompt injected into the ReAct agent
system_prompt.title: System Prompt

needs_validation.description: If True, supervisor routes this agent's output through validation_node
needs_validation.title: Needs Validation

extra_return_keys.description: Additional keys beyond success/output/error in run() return dict
extra_return_keys.title: Extra Return Keys

AgentConfig.title: AgentConfig

DBBackend.description:
Supported database backends for the scaffolded project.

These values determine which database-specific code is generated
in the mcp_server.py template and which dependencies are added
to requirements.txt.
DBBackend.title: DBBackend

tables.description: Table names scaffolded into schema docs
tables.title: Tables

connection_env_var.description: Environment variable name that holds the connection string
connection_env_var.title: Connection Env Var

use_alembic.description: Generate Alembic migration scaffold under backend/migrations/
use_alembic.title: Use Alembic

pre_commit.description: Generate .pre-commit-config.yaml with ruff and common hooks
pre_commit.title: Pre Commit

LLMModel.description:
Supported LLM models for agents and router nodes.

These model identifiers are used directly in the LangChain
ChatOpenAI constructor and must match the provider's API.
LLMModel.title: LLMModel

context_fields.description: ContextVar names injected into every log line
context_fields.title: Context Fields

structured_logging.description: Use structlog for JSON logging in the scaffolded project.
structured_logging.title: Structured Logging

description.default: An agentic project scaffolded by agentforge
description.title: Description

auth_type.description: Authentication strategy: none (open), api_key, or jwt
auth_type.title: Auth Type

api_key_env_var.description: Env var holding the secret key
api_key_env_var.title: Api Key Env Var

enable_ip_pseudonymization.description: Hash client IPs before logging in logging_middleware.py
enable_ip_pseudonymization.title: Enable Ip Pseudonymization

jwt_algorithm.description: JWT signing algorithm. Required when auth_type='jwt'.
jwt_algorithm.title: Jwt Algorithm

jwt_issuer.description: Expected JWT issuer claim (iss). Used as default in generated settings.
jwt_issuer.title: Jwt Issuer

jwt_audience.description: Expected JWT audience claim (aud). Used as default in generated settings.
jwt_audience.title: Jwt Audience

jwks_url.description: JWKS endpoint URL. Required when jwt_algorithm='RS256'.
jwks_url.title: Jwks Url

TestingConfig.description: Opt-in evaluation framework and benchmark scaffold options.

eval_framework.description: Evaluation framework to use. 'deepeval' enables the benchmark scaffold.
eval_framework.title: Eval Framework

enable_benchmarks.description: Generate DeepEval benchmark scaffold under backend/tests/benchmarks/. Requires eval_framework='deepeval'.
enable_benchmarks.title: Enable Benchmarks

TestingConfig.title: TestingConfig

ToolConfig.description: A single LangChain / MCP tool wired into an agent.

name.description: Python identifier used as tool function name
name.title: Name

description.description: Tool description shown to the LLM
description.title: Description

ToolConfig.title: ToolConfig

enable_feedback_loop.description: Wire feedback → improve_answer → feedback loop in the graph
enable_feedback_loop.title: Enable Feedback Loop

enable_validation_node.description: Keep validation_node in graph even when no agent needs_validation
enable_validation_node.title: Enable Validation Node

router_llm_model.description: Fast model used in query_router_node classification

router_llm_provider.description: LLM provider used in query_router_node classification.
router_llm_provider.title: Router Llm Provider

default_intent.description: Fallback intent when router cannot classify query
default_intent.title: Default Intent

enable_checkpointing.description: Persist LangGraph state via AsyncPostgresSaver. Requires database.backend='postgres'.
enable_checkpointing.title: Enable Checkpointing

description:
Root model — the full project.yaml document.

Example project.yaml:
----------------------
metadata:
  name: my_agent_api
  description: My first agentic project
  python_version: "3.11"

agents:
  - key: sql
    class_name: SQLAgent
    llm_model: gpt-4o-mini
    tools:
      - name: execute_sql
        description: Run a SQL query against the database
        mcp_resource: execute_sql
    needs_validation: true

database:
  backend: postgres
  tables: [orders, customers, products]

workflow:
  enable_feedback_loop: true
  enable_validation_node: true
  default_intent: sql
  router_llm_provider: openai   # default; set "anthropic" to use ChatAnthropic

api:
  title: My Agentic API
  query_max_length: 2000
  cors:
    origins: ["http://localhost:3000"]

observability:
  enable_tracing: true
  structured_logging: false     # default; set true to use structlog JSON logging

security:
  auth_type: api_key
  api_key_env_var: MY_API_KEY

ci:
  provider: github              # default: none (opt-in)
  python_version: "3.12"
  installer: uv                 # uv | pip | poetry

development:
  pre_commit: true              # default: false (opt-in)

testing:
  eval_framework: deepeval      # default: none (opt-in)
  enable_benchmarks: true       # default: false (opt-in)

enable_provider_registry: false  # default; set true to generate backend/config/provider_registry.py

enable_provider_registry.description: Generate backend/config/provider_registry.py in the scaffolded project.
enable_provider_registry.title: Enable Provider Registry

title: ProjectConfig
